title: Settle scheduled microtasks under fake timers
prompt: Repair the fake-timer boundary in `DeliveryAttempt`. The delivery is scheduled for the correct time, but after `await clock.runAllAsync()` the protected tests can still observe the transient `sending` state because asynchronous work started by the timer callback is not exposed to the clock. Ensure the existing scheduled delivery reaches its exact `delivered` or `failed` terminal snapshot before the asynchronous fake-timer drain completes. Preserve the public API, the single timer and its delay, the production delivery sequence, and the exact state fields and timestamps. Do not add polling, sleeps, extra timers, or environment-specific event-loop hooks. The project is dependency-free; keep all commands offline and deterministic. Do not modify the protected tests.
